rationale: Educ. Code §35.004 addresses liability immunity for school districts regarding library material vendors. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school or a teacher, librarian, or other staff member employed by a district or school is not liable for any claim or damage resulting from a library material vendor's violation of this chapter.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text pertains to library material vendor liability, not to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
